support: Staff; Team; Remuneration; Rewards; Profit Share; Equity Share; Payrise

cpd.objective: Learn to facilitate a discussion that explores the retention of key employees and (possible) ownership transfer pros and cons.

growth.fundamental: Exploring the various ownership (ransfer) options available to your business owner clients.

title: Partner Accountability
purpose: This template uses a 'points weighted matrix' to hold partners accountable in the areas of Ethics, Skills, Motivation and Work On vs In Performance. The system ultimately relies on a 'de-merit system' to help divide partnership profits - as a means to motivate & reward specific behaviours.
support: Accountability; Partner Rewards; Partner dealings; Partnership Income

cpd.objective: Learn how to use a contrast model (in this case, a matrix) to highlight the expectations of business partners in a (fianancial) professional services firm.

growth.fundamental: Learn how to use a contrast model (in this case, a matrix) to highlight the expectations of business partners in a (fianancial) professional services firm.

title: Stg. 1 Due Diligence
purpose: A short form due diligence option; perfect for small business purchases or as an initial board assessment prior to detailed investigation,
support: Value Drivers; Sale & Purchase

growth.fundamental: Comfortable with due diligence procedure; understand the need to avoid creating 'rushed' circumstance

title: Financial Systems Review
purpose: The templates in this section begin by highlighting weak points within the financial systems of a business. It's designed to help the business owner better administrate their business and reduce 'business shrinkage'. Your firm may require audit division assistance to deliver this service in entirety.
support: Inventory Management; Stock Turn; Financial Controls; Data Integrity; Staff Theft; Product Shrinkage; Misappropriation of funds; Stealing; Admin; Apps; Administration; Fraud; Theft; Dispute; Shareholder Dispute

cpd.objective: Learn how to facilitate the 'helicopter view' questions to uncover your clients financial systems risk.

growth.fundamental: Learn how to facilitate the 'helicopter view' questions to uncover your clients financial systems risk.

title: Stock Policies
purpose: This is a 'Weighted Average' model to help your clients identify the criteria by which they prioritise their stock purchasing. Importantly, this model still allows for the 'Trader' skill-set of your client but attempts to 'reign-in' their stock purchasing towards items that drive the most profits...
support: Inventory Management; Stock Turn; due diligence; financial controls

cpd.objective: How to help your clients introduce an Objective review of their current Subjective stock purchasing habits.

growth.fundamental: How to help your clients introduce an Objective review of their current Subjective stock purchasing habits.

title: Succession Planning
purpose: This section provides a framework to help you navigate the process of succession planning for your client. The process starts with a few 'pre-meeting' questions which the client completes and submits (via the portal) prior to your first meeting. One of the key differences about this framework is the use of a 'planning metaphor' to enable the respective parties to visualise the logical process and timelines ahead.
support: Succession Planning; Passing the Business Forward; Preparing for Business Sale; quiz

cpd.objective: Learn how to use this framework and its use of a 'planning metaphor' to enable the respective parties to visualise the logical process and timelines ahead.

growth.fundamental: Clear in the Framework 'Metaphor Story' to align stakeholders in the succession planning process

title: Farm Succession

cpd.objective: Learn how to use this framework and its use of a 'planning metaphor' to enable the respective parties to visualise the logical process and timelines ahead.
